one_sentence_purpose: An automated pipeline that transforms topics into production-ready TikTok, Reels, and Shorts videos using LLMs, TTS, stock footage, and Remotion rendering.
target_users: Content creators and developers who want to automate short-form vertical video production from the command line
visual_metaphors: a conveyor belt pipeline transforming text into video frames
film reel frames flowing through a terminal prompt
stacked vertical phone screens emerging from a command line

assets_needed.desc: Wide banner on white background with abstract pipeline stages flowing into vertical video frames, project name in hot pink
Wide banner on dark background with abstract pipeline stages flowing into vertical video frames, project name in hot pink
Square logo on white background with abstract play button merged with terminal cursor in pink and teal
Square logo on dark background with abstract play button merged with terminal cursor in pink and teal
GitHub social preview card with tagline, abstract video pipeline flow, pink and teal palette
